title: centaurea decurrens
intro: Centaurea decurrens, also known as the running knapweed, is a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea decurrens include its potential to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, thanks to its antiseptic and astringent properties. Centaurea decurrens is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture or capsule form to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
